nodes.name: backend/.dockerignore
nodes.summary: Specifies files and directories (like node_modules and .env) to be excluded from the Docker build context when containerizing the backend service.

nodes.name: backend/Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Containerizes the backend application using Node.js 20 Alpine, builds the project, runs Prisma migrations and database seeding, and exposes port 3001.

nodes.name: node
nodes.summary: Node.js backend container service running node:20-alpine and exposing port 3001.
